title: Brook Steals the Road Poneglyph Copy
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Brook as Sanji learns the truth about Pudding and Big Mom’s plan while the crew looks for a way out.
scene: The truth behind Pudding and Big Mom’s plan breaks Sanji’s hope, while the crew gathers critical information and allies.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What the?! is Mama being attacked?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: How dare you! While she's sleeping!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Are we supposed to save him?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi, down, boy! This ain't food for you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: WhoAaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa! It looks exactly like him!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I found it in the execution room inside the castle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Some seaweed I found in the kitchen's standing in for the afro.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't but see brook when I look at it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't think she'll realize we've snatched him from under her nose! (Probably!)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we can just switch this thing out for the real guy,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you leave Bruce Right inside the mirror barrier,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can go in and out as you please just by touching her.

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Betrayal Revealed storyline with 35 dialogue beats. Pudding’s deception and Big Mom’s intentions become clear, changing the rescue from infiltration to survival.
